title: Dr. Beckmann Stain Devils Pen & Ink | With colour particle remover | 50ml
features: Gently removes tough stains while caring for your clothes
description: Product Description The Dr. Beckmann Stain Devils Pen & Ink is specially developed with the the help of a colour-particle remover to seperate and eliminate colour pigment from fabrics. The product is ideal for the special characteristics of stains caused by ballpoint or highlighter pens, glue, wax crayons, finger paints or watercolours. Not suitable for: LEATHER, SUEDE, ACETATE/RAYON, CARPETS OR UPHOLSTERY. HOW TO USE IT: WASHING MACHINE: 1. Moisten stain well with Stain Devils liquid. 2. Leave to work for 10–15 mins. For stubborn stains allow the product to work for longer. Dab stained area with a dry cloth to soak up excess moisture after exposure time. 3. Wash fabric as normal. NON-WASHABLE FABRICS: 1. Dab the stained area thoroughly with a damp cloth after following the stain removal method above. IMPORTANT INFORMATION: - Stain removal should be carried out before washing. - Before use: test for colour fastness & material compatibility on an inconspicuous area. - Always follow fabric care instructions. - Do not treat stains on sensitive surfaces. - Place a suitable item underneath (e.g. saucer with clean cloth). ECO CONTRIBUTION: - 100% recyclable bottle excludes labels - 0% chlorine bleach, perfume & dyes - Made with 100% renewable electricity Ingredients Surfactant (6%, C13 alcohol ethoxylate) solvent (alcohol), chelating agent, alkaline agent Directions 1.Place clean white cloth under the garment beneath the stain and thoroughly moisten stain with solution. 2.Leave solution to work for 10-15 minutes. 3.Using a damp cloth, dab treated area continuously until all traces of the stain and solution have been removed.
